exercises.title: Transversal Pauli Implementation
exercises.description: Implement transversal Pauli gates for various codes.
tasks: Implement X_L = X^⊗n for Steane code
Implement Z_L = Z^⊗n for Steane code
Verify logical bit flip occurs correctly
hints: Verify by checking logical Z expectation value

exercises.title: Transversal CNOT Circuit
exercises.description: Build and test transversal CNOT between two encoded blocks.
tasks: Inject errors and verify they stay bounded
exercises.expectedOutput: Transversal CNOT with Bell state creation
hints: Each physical CNOT: control A[i], target B[i]
Inject X error on one control qubit
Should result in ≤1 error per block

exercises.title: Hadamard Self-Duality Check
exercises.description: Verify when Hadamard is transversal by checking self-duality.
tasks: Input stabilizers of a CSS code
Apply H transformation to all stabilizers
Check if transformed stabilizers are in original group
hints: Apply H^⊗n to stabilizer, check result
Self-dual: X stabs ↔ Z stabs under H

exercises.title: Error Propagation Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate error propagation through transversal gates.
tasks: Track errors through transversal H, S, CNOT
hints: CNOT: X propagates forward, Z backward
Non-transversal: could be many per block
